raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad nosuhtija wiffa
Drandse/ un runnaja us Ben-
jamina Behrneem/kas us to Ak-
mixa-Kalnu Rimmon bija/ un
litte teem Meeru pasazziht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta atgreesahs tanni Laikā
tee Benjamiteri/ un tee dewe win-
neem tahs Seewas / ko tee bij
likeuchi dsihwas patikt/ no tahui
Seewahm no Jabes eeksh Gile-
adas/ bet tur ne atraddahs
preeksch winneem gann.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad bija teem Zaudim
scheht pahr Benjaminu/ ka tas
KUNGS weenu Plihfuunu bij
darrijs Israēta Zilts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija tahs Drau-
dses Wezzajee/ ko darritim mehs/
ka tee Attiekschee Seewas dab-
bu? jo tahs Seewas no Benja-
mixa irr isdeldetas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija tee : To Ben-
jamiteru eemantojama Teesa pee-
nahk teem / kas isglahbuschees /
par Eemantoschanu/ ka ne kahda
Zilts tsdeldeta tohp no Israēta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet mehs ne warram teem
no muhtahm Meitahm Seewas
dohf/ jo Israēta Behrni irr ap-
swehrejschees/ fazzidami : No-
lahdehts lai trr/ kas teem Ben-
jamitekeem weenu Seewu dohd.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee fazzija : Redf/ eeksh
Sihlus irr ta KUNGA Sivehtki
fk Gaddus Betelam prett See-
meta pufti/ prett Rihteem tam
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee pawehleja Benja-
mixa Behrneem/un fazzija: E-
ta / un turrajtees fleppeni Wil-
na-Kalnōs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un skattajtees/ un redsi
kad tahs Meitas no Sihlus de-
damas ar Stabulehm isees/ ta-
iseita juhs no teem Wihna-Ka-
neem / un sagrahbeet preekfe-
jums/ ikatrs fawn Seewu ni-
tahm Meitahm noSihlus/un ne-
eita us Benjaminia Semint.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kad winnu Tehwi/je-
winnu Brahti nahfs preekfe-
mums bahrtees / tad fazzifi-
mehs us teem: Apscheblojeete-
pahr teem/ jo mehs ne eftam i-
katrs fawn Seewu ar Katroscha-
nu rehmuschi / bet juhs ne gri-
bejat winnas teem doht / tas tr-
tchim brihschaun juhsu Waina.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Benjaminia Behri-
darrija ta / un nehme Seewa-
pehz fawa Pulka no tahm / ka-
tur deijs/ tahs paschas laupij-
tee : Un tee nogahje un atgreesah-
us fawn Jhpaichunu/ un usta-
tija tohs Pilsfahtus/ un dsihwo-
ja eeksh teem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Israēta Behrni zet-
lahs tanni Laikā no turrenes/ ik-
katrs pee fawas Zilts/ un pee fa-
weein Raddeem/ un isgahje ni-
turrenes ikkatrs us fawn Jhpa-
ichunu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tannis Deenas ne bija ni-
weens Rehmisch eeksh Israēta/ ik-
katr-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
